info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

get.description: Retrieves a summary of subscription information for a space

200.description: Returns a summary of subscription information about a space.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/space/%7BspaceId%7D/billing/subscription/summary \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/space/%7BspaceId%7D/billing/subscription/summary", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.description: Retrieves a summary of subscription information across all spaces

200.description: Returns a summary of subscription information for each space.

get.description: Get paginated invoice list by spaceId

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/space/%7BspaceId%7D/billing/invoice/base-list?pageSize=SOME_INTEGER_VALUE&cursor=SOME_STRING_VALUE' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/space/%7BspaceId%7D/billing/invoice/base-list?pageSize=SOME_INTEGER_VALUE&cursor=SOME_STRING_VALUE", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.description: Get license details for the self-hosted related subscription

200.description: Returns license details for the self-hosted related subscription

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/billing/subscription/license/%7BlicenseId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/billing/subscription/license/%7BlicenseId%7D", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/billing/subscription/license \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/billing/subscription/license/manage-billing \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"returnUrl":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"returnUrl\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/billing/subscription/license/manage-billing", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

post.description: Get checkout session url for a space

200.description: Returns checkout session url about a space.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/space/%7BspaceId%7D/billing/subscription/checkout \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"priceId":"string","quantity":0,"successUrl":"string","cancelUrl":"string","isTrial":true,"clientReferenceId":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"priceId\":\"string\",\"quantity\":0,\"successUrl\":\"string\",\"cancelUrl\":\"string\",\"isTrial\":true,\"clientReferenceId\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/space/%7BspaceId%7D/billing/subscription/checkout", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

post.description: Get checkout session url for a self-hosted license

200.description: Returns checkout session url about a self-hosted license.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/billing/subscription/license/checkout \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"instanceId":"stringstringstringstringstringstring","priceId":"string","quantity":0,"successUrl":"string","cancelUrl":"string","clientReferenceId":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"instanceId\":\"stringstringstringstringstringstring\",\"priceId\":\"string\",\"quantity\":0,\"successUrl\":\"string\",\"cancelUrl\":\"string\",\"clientReferenceId\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",

}

conn.request("POST", "/api/billing/subscription/license/checkout", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
